title: amaryllis × campanulata
intro: Amaryllis × campanulata, also known as the belladonna lily or campanulata lily, is a type of ornamental plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic and anticholinergic effects, which have been utilized to treat conditions such as muscle spasms and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Amaryllis × campanulata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve heart health, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as tinctures and infusions, have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, but caution is advised due to the plant's toxicity and potential side effects.
